ausar thompson.detail: Played 25 minutes in Game 1 loss; Brave search references a prior ankle sprain exit vs. Spurs, not this game
ausar thompson.web_narrative: Thompson finished with only 1 assist against Orlando, falling short of the over-2 mark. No game-specific injury exit is indicated for this contest; the low assist total reflects a quiet offensive night in a losing effort.

chet holmgren.detail: Played 25 minutes in a blowout win; reduced minutes consistent with garbage-time management in a 35-point rout

de'aaron fox.detail: Played 34 minutes, scored 17 points with combined 15 assists alongside Castle in Game 1 win

desmond bane.detail: Played 35 minutes, scored 17 points in Game 1 win over Detroit

devin booker.detail: Played 33 minutes in a blowout loss; sat fourth quarter due to lopsided score, not injury
devin booker.web_narrative: Booker recorded only 2 assists against the Thunder's stifling defense in a 35-point blowout loss. The Suns' offense was largely dysfunctional (34.9% FG), limiting Booker's playmaking opportunities as OKC's defense neutralized Phoenix's half-court sets.

devin vassell.detail: Played 34 minutes, scored 15 points with 4 threes in Game 1 win

jalen williams.detail: Played 29 minutes in a blowout win; minutes reduced due to lopsided score in fourth quarter

jaylen brown.detail: Played 30 minutes, scored 26 points in Game 1 blowout win

jayson tatum.detail: Played 32 minutes in his first playoff game back from Achilles surgery; minutes managed in a blowout win
jayson tatum.web_narrative: Tatum made only 1 of his 3-point attempts while scoring 25 points, missing the over-2 mark. Playing in just his 17th game back from a torn Achilles, Tatum relied heavily on mid-range and paint scoring rather than catch-and-shoot threes, with the large blowout margin also limiting his fourth-quarter volume.
